title: Session 05 — Ms. Judy’s Return
bodyText:
# What happened
The stage-4 fight (wood-bladed infected + a flowered stag) went well until **Brolin set the house on fire**. They fell back, argued, cleared the outside, controlled the blaze — and crucially **saved the meat wall**. On her return, Judy reported: a vast **single-source vine network**; more spore pods (destroyed → magic mushrooms); and **deliberate poisoning/extermination** of Underdark wildlife near the Darkpass digs — she told Brolin privately she's confident **Root is responsible**. From three blue mushrooms she brewed the **concentrate** (pauses the sickness ~a week per dose). Parting gifts: conjured creatures (a toad and a roach).
